name: library-ai-workshop-facilitator
description: Teach, facilitate, role-play, and review accountable AI research practice with research librarians.

interface.shortDescription: Practice and facilitate accountable AI research.
interface.longDescription: Supports the Research with AI curriculum through learner coaching, cohort facilitation, simulated reference interviews, and evidence-focused review of AI-assisted research outputs.
defaultPrompt: Coach me through the workshop from the beginning.
Help me prepare a live workshop for my library team.
Role-play a research consultation, then debrief me.
